ddls:
CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for login */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for security */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., designer, project manager, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "color_palettes" (
  "palette_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each palette */,
  "palette_name" TEXT /* Name of the palette */,
  "palette_description" TEXT /* Description of the palette */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the palette was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the palette was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the palette */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the palette */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number of the palette */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean flag to indicate if the palette is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("palette_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_color_palettes_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_color_palettes_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "colors" (
  "color_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each color */,
  "palette_id" INTEGER /* ID of the palette to which the color belongs */,
  "color_name" TEXT /* Name of the color (e.g., Blue, Green) */,
  "value_r" INTEGER /* Red value of the color (0-255) */,
  "value_g" INTEGER /* Green value of the color (0-255) */,
  "value_b" INTEGER /* Blue value of the color (0-255) */,
  "layer" INTEGER /* Layer number associated with the color */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the color was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the color was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the color */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the color */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number of the color */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean flag to indicate if the color is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("color_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_colors_palette_id FOREIGN KEY ("palette_id") REFERENCES color_palettes ("palette_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_colors_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_colors_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "layers" (
  "layer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each layer */,
  "layer_name" TEXT /* Name of the layer */,
  "layer_description" TEXT /* Description of the layer */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the layer was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the layer was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the layer */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the layer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("layer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_layers_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_layers_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "project_description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the project was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the project was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the project */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the project */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean flag to indicate if the project is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "palette_projects" (
  "palette_project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each palette-project relationship */,
  "palette_id" INTEGER /* ID of the palette */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the relationship was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the relationship was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the relationship */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the relationship */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("palette_project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_palette_projects_palette_id FOREIGN KEY ("palette_id") REFERENCES color_palettes ("palette_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_palette_projects_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_palette_projects_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_palette_projects_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "color_harmonization" (
  "harmonization_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each harmonization scheme */,
  "harmonization_name" TEXT /* Name of the harmonization scheme */,
  "harmonization_type" TEXT /* Type of the harmonization scheme (e.g., complementary, analogous) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the harmonization scheme was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the harmonization scheme was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the harmonization scheme */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the harmonization scheme */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("harmonization_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_color_harmonization_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_color_harmonization_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "color_harmonization_colors" (
  "harmonization_color_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each harmonization-color relationship */,
  "harmonization_id" INTEGER /* ID of the harmonization scheme */,
  "color_id" INTEGER /* ID of the color */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the relationship was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the relationship was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the relationship */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the relationship */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("harmonization_color_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_color_harmonization_colors_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_color_harmonization_colors_color_id FOREIGN KEY ("color_id") REFERENCES colors ("color_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_color_harmonization_colors_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_color_harmonization_colors_harmonization_id FOREIGN KEY ("harmonization_id") REFERENCES color_harmonization ("harmonization_id")
)
